title: Replace profile avatar with new uploaded image and use it everywhere (logos, player cards, PWA icons — not hero background)

requirements.text: Save the newly uploaded gaming artwork image (quality_restoration_20260128182709920-4.jpg — a masked figure in a white turtleneck with a Gucci cap, neon red halo, red diamond YouTube play button, and dark esports background) as the new profile avatar static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/profile-avatar.dim_512x512.png, replacing the existing file.

quotes: Is pic ko app Ka har jagha Jahan pics lagi hen wahan Laga do

acceptanceCriteria: The file frontend/public/assets/generated/profile-avatar.dim_512x512.png is replaced with the new uploaded image (quality_restoration_20260128182709920-4.jpg).
The image is saved at exactly 512×512 px resolution.

requirements.text: Generate a 192×192 px variant of the newly uploaded image (quality_restoration_20260128182709920-4.jpg) and save it as frontend/public/assets/generated/pwa-icon.dim_192x192.png, replacing the existing PWA icon at that size.

quotes: app open karte waqat app download hone ke Baad us Ka icon

acceptanceCriteria: frontend/public/assets/generated/pwa-icon.dim_192x192.png is replaced with the new image cropped/resized to 192×192 px.

requirements.text: Generate a 512×512 px variant of the newly uploaded image (quality_restoration_20260128182709920-4.jpg) and save it as frontend/public/assets/generated/pwa-icon.dim_512x512.png, replacing the existing PWA icon at that size.

quotes: app open karte waqat app download hone ke Baad us Ka icon

acceptanceCriteria: frontend/public/assets/generated/pwa-icon.dim_512x512.png is replaced with the new image cropped/resized to 512×512 px.

requirements.text: Audit all frontend components (Navbar, AboutSection, RosterSection, PlayerCard, Footer, NewsSection, AnnouncementCard, PWAInstallBanner, LandingPage) and ensure every location that displays a profile image, player avatar, or logo uses /assets/generated/profile-avatar.dim_512x512.png. The hero background image (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png) must NOT be changed.

quotes: Jahan Jahan profiles hen wahan wahan ye pic Laga do
Sirf background ko chor kar Baki Jahan Jahan logo hen wahan wahan ye pic Laga do

acceptanceCriteria: The Navbar logo/avatar displays the new profile-avatar.dim_512x512.png image.
The AboutSection brand profile image displays the new profile-avatar.dim_512x512.png image.
All PlayerCard components use /assets/generated/profile-avatar.dim_512x512.png as the fallback or default avatar.
The Footer brand logo/avatar image uses /assets/generated/profile-avatar.dim_512x512.png.
No component references any old placeholder, 'neez3z', or third-party avatar URL.
The hero background image (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png) remains unchanged.
The PWA home screen icon (pwa-icon files) is updated to the new image but the hero background is untouched.

constraints: Do not change the hero background image (frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png).
Do not modify any file listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Changing the hero section background image.
Adding new sections or features to the landing page.

edits: Resize/crop to 512×512 for profile avatar use (quality_restoration_20260128182709920-4.jpg > profile-avatar.dim_512x512.png)
Resize/crop to 192×192 for PWA icon use (quality_restoration_20260128182709920-4.jpg > pwa-icon.dim_192x192.png)
Resize/crop to 512×512 for PWA icon use (quality_restoration_20260128182709920-4.jpg > pwa-icon.dim_512x512.png)
